intent: build me a digital fortress
create a watchdog that guards my files
build a spider that crawls the web
make a pipeline that flows data from source to sink
construct a bridge between JSON and XML worlds
build a time machine for my database
create a guardian angel for my server processes
weave a safety net around my API endpoints
build a lighthouse that monitors my services and alerts me
forge a chain of transformations from raw CSV to clean reports

Build a user registration system. Users should provide email and password. Passwords must be at least 8 characters with one uppercase, one lowercase, and one number. Store users in SQLite. Hash passwords with bcrypt. Return a session token on successful registration. Log all registration attempts.

Create a file backup system. It should watch a source directory for changes every 30 seconds. When files change, copy them to a backup directory with a timestamp suffix. Keep the last 5 versions of each file. Generate a backup manifest JSON. Support include and exclude patterns via a config file.

Build a URL shortener service. Accept long URLs via a POST endpoint. Generate a unique 6-character code. Store mappings in SQLite. Redirect short URLs to originals via GET. Track click counts per URL. Show stats via an API endpoint. Handle duplicate submissions gracefully.

Implement a markdown blog engine. Read posts from a directory of .md files. Parse YAML front matter for title, date, tags. Convert markdown to HTML. Generate an index page sorted by date. Generate tag pages. Support pagination with 10 posts per page. Output static HTML files.

Create an inventory management system. Products have name, SKU, quantity, and price. Support add, update, delete operations via CLI. Warn when quantity falls below a threshold. Generate reorder reports. Export to CSV. Store in SQLite with proper constraints.
build a web API for a todo list
create a chat application
build a password manager
make a file sharing service
create a monitoring dashboard
build an email notification system
create a data migration tool
build a deployment automation script
create a log rotation system
build an API rate limiter middleware
find the most efficient way to process 10GB of CSV data on a machine with 1GB RAM
build a system that can detect if two Python files are semantically equivalent
create the fastest possible way to find duplicate lines across 1000 text files
design a compression algorithm optimized for JSON data
build a query language for nested Python dictionaries
create a tool that converts between any two data formats automatically
build a diff tool that understands Python code structure, not just text
create a system that generates realistic test data matching a schema
design a priority system for processing tasks that adapts based on historical completion times
build a dead code detector that works across multiple Python files
implement caching for a function that queries a slow database
build a system to deduplicate records across multiple CSV files
create a configuration system for a Python application
implement real-time file synchronization between two directories
build error handling for a REST API client
create a task scheduling system that runs jobs at specified times
implement a search function across multiple file types
build a notification system that supports multiple channels
create a data validation layer for user input
implement connection management for a database client
build a CSV parser that handles quoted fields with embedded newlines, commas, and unicode
create a recursive function with proper tail-call optimization for deeply nested structures
implement a thread-safe singleton that works with multiprocessing too
build a date parser that handles every common date format including ISO 8601, RFC 2822, and natural language
create a memory-efficient iterator for processing arbitrarily large files line by line with look-ahead and look-behind capabilities
